description_long: This is a round, lidded bowl with a short pedestal base, featuring a striking blue and gold decorative pattern. The body of the bowl is adorned with intricate gold floral motifs set against a blue dotted background, giving it an ornate and luxurious appearance. The lid is black with a central gold and blue floral medallion, topped by a small, rounded gold knob. The rim and base of the bowl are accented with metallic gold bands, enhancing its elegant look. The bowl appears to be made of a hard, glossy material, likely ceramic or metal, with a smooth, reflective finish. The overall design suggests it is both functional and decorative, suitable for special occasions or display.
description: A round, lidded bowl with blue and gold floral patterns, metallic accents, and a glossy finish, standing on a short pedestal base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate blue and gold floral pattern, black lid with gold medallion, and gold-rimmed edges.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the bowl's side curvature and the continuity of the decorative motifs.
description_view_2: Another angled view highlighting the symmetry of the floral designs and the reflective quality of the gold accents.
description_view_3: View from the opposite side, showing the consistent pattern and the pedestal base beneath the bowl.
attribute_location: ceremonial space or decorative dining area
attribute_context_of_use: decorative display or serving special foods during ceremonies
attribute_decorative_patterns: gold floral motifs and blue dotted patterns encircle the bowl and lid, with a central gold and blue medallion on the lid
